title: Koros
content:

'''Koros''' was the primary star of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]], located in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="BatDC" />

{{Star-stub}}
